'''Devir''' became the [[Emperor/Legends|empress]] of the [[Krytollak]] people circa [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]]. As the Krytollaks had a rigid social and political structure, and strongly believed that monarchs were destined to rule, she and her people welcomed the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] when they first made contact. She quickly recognized [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] as her lord and master, and the rightful [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|ruler of the galaxy]].<ref name="GG12" />

Imperial advisors helped her rule the Krytollak homeworld of [[Thandruss]], giving her people access to modern technology and offworld trade for the first time in their history. Some Krytollaks complained about the high taxes and tribute demanded by the Imperial government, but they always blamed their problems on the Emperor's underlings rather than Palpatine himself.<ref name="GG12" />
